school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: Either Drama goes with Hale or Ellis goes with Library.
The class in the Studio's grade is at least 6% away from the member of the Yearbook club's grade.
81% goes with at least two of Hale, Cloister, Choir, and Period 4.
Nash's grade is higher than both the member of the Debate club's grade and the class in Period 4's grade.
85% goes with exactly two of Frost, Cloister, Debate, and Period 2.
85% goes with exactly one of Debate, Period 2, or Period 4.
Exactly one of these is true: Ellis goes with 81%; Studio goes with Yearbook; Chess goes with Period 1.
Nash, Greenhouse, and 81% go with Period 2, Period 4, and Period 5, in some order.
77%, 83%, and 85% go with Chess, Period 1, and Period 3, in some order.
Either Chess goes with 81% or Period 1 goes with 83%.
Of the class in the Library and the member of the Debate club, whoever has the higher grade has the higher period.
At least one of Library does not go with Period 3, 83% does not go with Hale, or Period 1 goes with Hale if and only if either Library goes with Carver or Carver goes with Period 2 (but not both).

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: Either Skewer goes with Nadia or Magnus goes with Pirc.
The Sicilian player's rating is at least 150 away from the player who loves the Zugzwang's rating.
1893 goes with at least two of Nadia, French, Gambit, and 2nd.
Vera's rating is higher than both the player who loves the Pin's rating and the player who placed 2nd's rating.
1993 goes with exactly two of Mikhail, French, Pin, and 4th.

Vera, London, and 1893 go with 4th, 2nd, and 1st, in some order.
1793, 1943, and 1993 go with Fork, 5th, and 3rd, in some order.
Either Fork goes with 1893 or 5th goes with 1943.
Of the Pirc player and the player who loves the Pin, whoever has the higher rating has the higher placing.
At least one of Pirc does not go with 3rd, 1943 does not go with Nadia, or 5th goes with Nadia if and only if either Pirc goes with Boris or Boris goes with 4th (but not both).
